name: ga-medicaid-policy
note: Georgia DCH GAMMIS portal — Part II per-program Policy & Procedure manuals (~70 current, quarterly 04/01/2026 release). ASP.NET DotNetNuke: select category 'Current Policy Manuals' (value=2) → 50/page paginated grid; PDF download is a per-row __doPostBack('…$Datalist$ctlNN$Select') — no static URLs. Part I (general billing) is a separate row in the same list.

docs.title: Part I — Policies and Procedures for Medicaid / PeachCare for Kids
Part II — Orthotic and Prosthetic Services
Part II — Provider Administered Drug List Manual
Part II — EDWP (CCSP and SOURCE) Personal Support Services
Part II — EDWP (CCSP and SOURCE) General Services
Part II — Independent Care Waiver Services
Part II — HCBS Settings Rule — Provider Guidance Manual

_comment: GAMMIS Provider Manuals tabId/17. ~70 'Current Policy Manuals' (Part II per-program) + Part I general, refreshed quarterly. List requires category-select postback then paginates 50/row; each download is a row-select postback that streams the PDF (no /StaticContent/ path exposed). fetch-reference will need a browser handler: set Selection=2 → iterate Datalist ctl03..ctlNN Select postbacks across 2 pages. Captured 17 detector-relevant of ~70.
